content.sprintName: Sprint 2 - Core Platform Completion & AI Foundation
content.sprintGoal: Complete EPIC-1 (Core Task Platform) with S-1.3 Project Organization, and begin EPIC-2 (AI Prioritization) with S-2.1 Priority Scoring Model

storyStatus.title: Project Organization & Labels
storyStatus.notes: Project CRUD and label management complete. Drag-and-drop project reordering in final QA. Expected complete by Feb 29.

storyStatus.title: AI Priority Scoring Model

blockers.blocker: Waiting for production-representative training dataset from S-1.1 user data pipeline
blockers.impact: Cannot begin final model fine-tuning until real task data is available
blockers.resolution: Using synthetic dataset for initial training; real data pipeline expected Feb 28

storyStatus.notes: Model architecture finalized, initial training on synthetic data shows 82% accuracy. gRPC service scaffolding complete. Awaiting real data for fine-tuning.

riskUpdates.update: Initial model accuracy at 82% on synthetic data is promising but needs validation on real task data. Will reassess after fine-tuning with production data.
Cross-training session completed with backend engineer on ML inference serving. Documentation of training pipeline 70% complete.

blockers.description: CI/CD pipeline intermittent failures due to Docker image pull rate limiting from Docker Hub
blockers.impact: Delays some PR merges by 10-15 minutes during retries
blockers.resolution: Migrating to AWS ECR for base image caching. Expected resolution March 1.

achievements: S-1.1 (Authentication) passed security audit with zero critical findings
S-1.2 (Task CRUD) performance benchmarks exceed targets: p95 at 87ms vs 200ms target
Design system component library published internally with Storybook documentation
Team velocity stabilized at 21 story points per sprint
upcomingWork: Complete S-1.3 Project Organization (remaining QA items)
Complete S-2.1 AI Priority Scoring Model (fine-tuning with real data)
Sprint 3 planning session scheduled for March 2
content.teamMorale: Team morale is high following the security audit pass and strong performance benchmarks. The ML training data dependency is the primary concern but has a clear resolution path.

stakeholderActions.action: VP Product to review AI priority UX mockups before Sprint 3 planning
